steps.title: Multiply equation (1) by 5 to align x coefficients
steps.content: To eliminate $x$, multiply the first equation by 5: $$5x + 120y = 300$$

steps.title: Divide and simplify to find y
steps.content: $$y = \frac{273}{117}$$ Divide numerator and denominator by their GCD of 39: $$y = \frac{7}{3}$$
